flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lorain County Community College fell 40% between 2006 and 2009 (12.8% → 7.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lorain County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.8k → $4.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lorain County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
